character_skill_equipped_shape.name: character_skill_equipped_shape
character_skill_equipped_shape.value: ("character_skill"."equipped" = 0 AND "character_skill"."slot" IS NULL) OR ("character_skill"."equipped" = 1 AND "character_skill"."unlocked" = 1 AND "character_skill"."slot" IS NOT NULL)

hero_skill_equipped_shape.name: hero_skill_equipped_shape
hero_skill_equipped_shape.value: ("hero_skill"."equipped" = 0 AND "hero_skill"."slot" IS NULL) OR ("hero_skill"."equipped" = 1 AND "hero_skill"."unlocked" = 1 AND "hero_skill"."slot" IS NOT NULL)
